title: Willow's Horror Cave Sounds
description: Resoruce Pack that changes cave sounds to more terrifying sounds
body:
This resource pack changes all cave sounds in the game.

I really recommend using [Sound Physics Remastered](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound-physics-remastered) since it will work great!
 

(If you use it personally in any videos or showcases please credit me thanks! :3)

Also term name of "Willow" is my old username on CF and Minecraft. If anyone is wondering why this RP is called like that.
